channel.title: Posts on Sadegroo
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Sadegroo

item.title: One Simulink Model, Two Targets: A Digital Twin for an Inverted Pendulum
item.description: A Simulink digital twin, an STM32 motor driver in two flavours (stepper and brushless), and a student competition, all built around a 25 cm pendulum that refuses to fall over.
